_meta.description: Answer key for scoring an automated job-application run against the FlashTec 'Senior .NET Engineer' form. Each entry maps a STABLE form field key (from job_app_benchmark/shared/applicationSchema.ts) to the CORRECT expected value derived from test_assets/jason_statham.json, plus a match type that score.py knows how to evaluate.

matchTypes.one_of: Actual must equal (case-insensitive) any value in 'expected' (a list). Used where the fixture value and the form's canonical option differ but are equivalent (phone formats, state abbrev vs full name, degree wording, 'heard about us' wording).
matchTypes.numeric: Parse both sides as numbers (strip $ , spaces) and compare within 'tolerance'.
matchTypes.contains: Free text. Passes when at least 'min_keywords' of the 'keywords' appear (case-insensitive substring) in the actual value.
matchTypes.contains_all: Array/multi-select. Passes when at least 'min_keywords' of the listed keywords are present across the joined actual values.

_meta.scoringNotes: Fields with "scored": false are excluded from the denominator (cosmetic, optional, or EEO fields that are masked in the server audit log and whose fixture answers are 'Decline...' which are not valid form options).

expected: No, I am not willing to relocate
I already live in the Dallas, TX area
willingToRelocate.note: Fixture says 'No'; either the explicit decline option or the local-area option is acceptable since the candidate already lives in Dallas.

skills.note: Fixture skill strings are richer than the form's checkbox options; require a meaningful overlap of core .NET skills.

portfolioUrl.note: Fixture has both a portfolio and a github URL; either is an acceptable portfolio answer.

highestDegree.note: Fixture 'Bachelor of Science' maps to the form option 'Bachelor's Degree'.

school.expected: The University of Texas at Dallas

graduationDate.note: Form may render a full ISO date; fixture is year-month.

salaryExpectation.note: Fixture is '$165,000'; numeric match strips $ and commas.

whyInterested.note: Free-text essay; pass if it references the core themes of the fixture's answer.

heardAboutUs.note: Fixture 'Company careers page' maps to the form option 'Company Website'.

gender.note: EEO field; fixture declines and the value is masked in the server audit log. Not scored.

ethnicity.note: EEO field; masked + declined. Not scored.

veteranStatus.expected: I am not a protected veteran
veteranStatus.note: EEO field; masked in audit log. Not scored.

disabilityStatus.note: EEO field; masked + declined. Not scored.

certifyTrue.note: Consent checkbox; required by the form to submit at all, so not a discriminating score field.

consentDataProcessing.note: Consent checkbox; required to submit. Not scored.

signed.note: Signature flag; required to submit. Not scored.

resumeFileId.note: Upload id is randomized at runtime; presence is required to submit but the id itself is not a stable expected value. Not scored here (a runner may separately assert a resume was attached).

coverLetterFileId.note: Optional upload; id randomized. Not scored.
